description_long: This object is a vintage television set with a large, convex glass screen encased in a wooden cabinet. The front features a metallic control panel on the right side, equipped with a rotary dial and several round push buttons, as well as a woven speaker grille below the screen. The wood finish is dark and shows signs of wear, giving it a well-used, retro appearance. The back panel is made of a lighter brown material, likely fiberboard, with ventilation slots, a large circular access port, and printed safety warnings, including a 'Bellini' brand label. The sides are plain, with the wood grain visible and some discoloration from age or use. The television stands on four angled wooden legs, elevating it slightly above the ground.
description: A vintage wooden television set with a convex glass screen, metallic control panel, and woven speaker grille, showing signs of age and wear.
description_view_0: The front view displays the convex glass screen, metallic control panel with buttons and dial, and a woven speaker grille beneath the screen.
description_view_1: The left side view shows a plain wooden surface with visible grain and discoloration, with no controls or features.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a fiberboard back panel with ventilation slots, a large circular access port, safety warnings, and the 'Bellini' brand label.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a plain wooden surface with grain and discoloration, lacking any controls or features.
attribute_bezel_design: Thick, wooden bezel with a dark brown finish and visible grain, slightly rounded edges, and a metallic control panel on the right.
attribute_control_button_layout: Clustered on the front right side, with a rotary dial above three round push buttons.
